title: hymenophyllum polyanthos var. sturmii
intro: Hymenophyllum polyanthos var. sturmii, also known as Sturm's Scale Fern, is a variety of the Hymenophyllum polyanthos plant, which is a type of epiphytic fern native to Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The Sturm's Scale Fern has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
